flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Trocaire College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($10.5k → $12.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 14 pp at Trocaire College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (19.2% vs 33.5%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Trocaire College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.7k → $20.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Trocaire College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).
